About_&_Key_Points:
About
Sangam (India) Limited is engaged in the business of manufacturing and selling of Synthetic Blended, Cotton & Texturised yarn, Fabrics, Denim Fabrics and readymade seamless garment.
[1]
Key Points
Leadership
[1]
One of the largest manufacturers of PV dyed Yarn and Denim Fabric. The company is the market leader in PV Yarn, PV Fabric, and Denim Fabric.
